programme.desc: Young Natalie says her boyfriend has a violent anger problem and she fears for her life and that of their 10-month-old son.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up
programme.sub-title: From Top TV Newscaster to Drunken Mom

programme.title: Dr. Phil Wake Up

programme.title: Farm To Fit: The Road to Regenerative Health

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: The Boy in the Bunker: The Exclusive Interview With Ethan and His Mother
programme.desc: Six-year-old Ethan, who was abducted at gunpoint and held captive in an underground bunker in Alabama for nearly a week, and his mother, Jennifer, talk to Dr. Phil; specialists tell how to help him cope with what he has experienced.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: Are My Children in a Cult?
programme.desc: James accuses his estranged wife of being controlled by a religious group and says he fears that his four children may be in danger.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.desc: Ariel Castro abduction survivor Michelle Knight reveals the acts of cruelty that took place in the Cleveland house.

programme.title: Dr. Phil: True Crime
programme.sub-title: Chained, Tortured and Starved: The First Cleveland Kidnapping Victim Reveals All
programme.desc: Ariel Castro abduction survivor Michelle Knight reveals details of more than a decade of captivity in the Cleveland house, the day she and the other women were rescued and what her life has been like since.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime

programme.desc: Scientists and medical professionals fight to treat and cure HIV and AIDS, while activists protest the government's mistreatment of the epidemic.

programme.title: For the Love of Friends
programme.desc: Performance rehearsal clips, interviews and archival footage highlight the life and work of activist Brent Nicholson Earle, whose 10,000-mile run around the U.S. in 1986 raised awareness about the plight of AIDS patients.

programme.title: Stories From the Stage
programme.desc: Three stories about the power of gifts, including a woman who donates a kidney to a stranger and a woman who receives a gift from her father on the night of her first high school dance.

programme.title: Awakening in Taos: The Mabel Dodge Luhan Story
programme.desc: Mabel Dodge's evolution as a writer, salon hostess, art patroness, social activist, and resident of New Mexico.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: Consuelo Mack WealthTrack
programme.desc: Michael Lippert, head of Technology Research at Baron Capital, assesses the AI investment boom.

programme.title: Asia Insight
programme.desc: An in-depth portrait of Asia today, covering its dynamism as a center of growth.

programme.title: Global Spirit
programme.desc: Origins, translations and interpretations of sacred texts.

programme.title: Global Spirit
programme.desc: Dr. Jacob Needleman, philosophy professor; Pir Zia Inayat-Khan, scholar and teacher of Islam and Sufism.

programme.title: Global Spirit
programme.desc: Mohawk educator and storyteller Kay Olan; Orland Bishop, community organizer who works with members of the Crips and the Bloods street gangs in L.A.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: Presenting a round-up of the most recent news and developments from across the world.

programme.title: BBC News America
programme.desc: Live news program produced out of BBC's Washington, D.C. bureau; host Sumi Somaskanda.

programme.title: France 24
programme.desc: Live feed from leading 24/7 international news and current affairs channel based in Paris, providing key information to understand ever-more complex global events through in-depth analysis and an international lens.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: World events, business news and weather forecasts; broadcast in English.

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: The military technologies that helped propel the colonies to victory, from the Brown Bess musket to the world's first military submarine.

programme.title: Secrets of the Dead
programme.desc: Forensic anthropologists excavate the early American colony of Jamestown, Va., and find bones of a 14-year-old English girl.

programme.title: Secrets of the Dead

programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.
